title: Vectors & Matrices
blurb: Unit-by-unit practice for the Vectors & Matrices course — components and magnitudes to determinants and systems.

units.title: Vectors & Coordinates
units.blurb: What a vector is, components and magnitude, equal/opposite/parallel vectors, and unit vectors.

units.title: Vector Arithmetic
units.blurb: Tip-to-tail addition, scaling, subtraction, vectors inside figures, and the section formula.

units.title: The Dot Product
units.blurb: u·v two ways, angles from the sign, perpendicularity tests, and the |u+v|² toolbox.

units.title: Vectors in Space
units.blurb: The third coordinate: 3D magnitudes and dot products, the box diagonal, and normal vectors of planes.

units.title: Matrices & Operations
units.blurb: Grids with an address system: entrywise arithmetic, row-times-column multiplication, identity and powers.

units.title: Determinants, Inverses & Systems
units.blurb: ad − bc, the 2×2 inverse, Cramer's rule, and matrices as transformations — the capstone.
